templates.name: Never force-push to main
templates.problem: Stops destructive history rewrites on protected branches before they land.
templates.roi: Protects every shared repo from the fastest irreversible mistake.
templates.rollout: Enable on every team repo on day one.

templates.name: Never skip tests before commit
templates.problem: Requires proof before code leaves the laptop, reducing broken commits and noisy CI.
templates.roi: Cuts review churn and CI rollback time across the team.

templates.name: Require evidence before saying done
templates.problem: Prevents agents from claiming success without test, deploy, or runtime evidence.
templates.roi: Raises trust in autonomous runs and reduces manual re-checking.
templates.rollout: Use for every workflow where proof matters more than speed.

templates.name: Protect production SQL
templates.problem: Blocks destructive SQL operations against production-like targets.
templates.roi: One saved incident pays for the whole rollout.
templates.rollout: Turn on for any team touching live data.

templates.name: Back up .env before editing
templates.problem: Flags risky config edits before tokens or local credentials are lost.
templates.roi: Reduces secret churn and local breakage during setup work.
templates.rollout: Good default for every machine and shared repo.

templates.name: Promote known-good workflows
templates.problem: Turns repeated thumbs-up patterns into recommended workflow defaults and starter rules.
templates.roi: Helps new agents and new teammates start from what already works.
templates.rollout: Use with shared lessons to accelerate onboarding.
